scripts.start: npm i && npm run setup && npm run dev
scripts.deploy: npx wrangler d1 execute DB --remote --file=./schema.sql && npx wrangler deploy
scripts.reset-pw: npx wrangler d1 execute DB --local --command "UPDATE config SET admin_password=NULL WHERE id=1"
scripts.reset-remote-db: npx wrangler d1 execute DB --remote --command "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS channels, filters, config;" && npx wrangler d1 execute DB --remote --file=./schema.sql
scripts.reset-remote-pw: npx wrangler d1 execute DB --remote --command "UPDATE config SET admin_password=NULL WHERE id=1"
